text.tspan: M3x15 from rear through panel into HEX6.3
behind and then through MEGA65 main board
Power Management FPGA board goes here,
Don't forget to do the modification to allow
it to be powered from external 5V! You need
2mm screws for this, or some other way to
fix it in place, e.g., twisted wire loops.
on the HEX6.3s and is then fixed
Note the DC:DC board doesn't have
M3x15 from this side, then HEX25 on rear, i.e, poking down
M3x15 from rear, then HEX25 this side,
HEX25 on rear, i.e, poking down
M3x15 from rear, then HEX25 this side, i.e, poking up
